title: Datasets and Checkpoints for RNA Secondary Structure Prediction
author: Anonymity
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains anonymized datasets and model checkpoints for a submitted manuscript. 
 The provided files include: 
 
 
  Datasets:  Training, validation, and testing datasets used in this paper. 
 
 
  Checkpoints:  Pre-trained model weights that can be used to reproduce the results and perform inference on new RNA sequences. 
 
 
 The source code will be released upon acceptance.
